claim: Cursor Composer enables true multi-file AI coding by allowing an agent to modify 5-20 files simultaneously with proper context integration, not just sequential edits.
actionable: When using Cursor Composer, provide file context for all related files upfront; ask for component extraction, styling refactors, or API migrations that span multiple files in a single prompt.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: Claude 3.5 Sonnet remains the most reliable model for AI coding tasks despite GPT-4o's recency; Sonnet makes fewer mistakes in multi-file refactors and integrates better with code tools.
actionable: Configure Cursor to use Claude 3.5 Sonnet for production code changes; reserve GPT-4o for exploration or non-critical code generation.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: System prompts for IDE integration should specify which imports are auto-available (e.g., Vue component imports in Nuxt) to avoid unnecessary import statements in generated code.
actionable: Add to your Cursor settings: 'In Nuxt projects, auto-imported components and composables don't need explicit imports; composables and components from #app are pre-available.'
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: AI models struggle with single-keystroke event handlers in Vue/frontend frameworks; instead of relying on onKeyup/onKeydown parsing, implement event handling manually when keybindings are important.
actionable: For keyboard shortcuts, use Cmd+P or Escape manually in JavaScript rather than relying on onKeyup event handlers; AI often misinterprets these correctly.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: Cursor Composer is most effective for component extraction, styling refactors, and API integration across files; it's less effective for complex logic changes requiring deep domain knowledge.
actionable: Use Composer for structural changes (moving code to new files, styling updates); use inline editing for logic bugs or algorithm refinement.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: Multi-file AI coding with Cursor Composer (+ Aider for open-source work) is now the baseline expectation for 2024+ AI-driven engineering; single-file editing is insufficient for production work.
actionable: Adopt multi-file AI coding tools (Cursor Composer or Aider) as your primary workflow; treat single-file edits as exceptions, not the default.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: Iterative prompting with Composer (make a change, check output, refine) is more effective than complex single prompts; the agent learns context from each iteration.
actionable: In Composer, avoid 10-step prompts; instead break them into 2-3 step sequences, accept changes, then refine. Each iteration improves context.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP

claim: Adding reference files (examples of similar code patterns) to Composer context dramatically improves output quality; AI learns from example styles and patterns.
actionable: When refactoring components, add one reference file showing your preferred style; ask Composer to 'match the style of [reference_file]'.
source_title: Cursor Composer: MULTI-FILE AI Coding for engineers that SHIP
